title: saino's bedwars texture pack
description: This texture pack retextures the tools in bedwars, and majority of the items you use in game. (no blocks or armour yet)
body:
**A texture pack that changes most of the items used in Hypixel bedwars like the tools (only the tools used in bedwars are changed) and items like potions, fireballs. There is a problem with the background of the title screen, i will try to fix this but if it bother you there are mods/texture packs out there. - I might texture armour and/or some blocks in later versions)





- credit to u/wathquan whose weapons texture pack is tuff and some of the weapons in this pack are inspired by theirs**



-shout out LeBron for inspiring me to put in the work
-shout out Newton for inventing gravity, i wouldn't have made this texture pack without bro
